description: Configuration schema for Synapse runtime logging and replication settings.

logging.description: Logging configuration for Synapse runtime diagnostics and event output.

logger.description: Logger backend selection and backend-specific configuration.

type.description: Logger backend type. Currently only file logging is supported.

config.description: Configuration for the selected logger backend.

path.description: Filesystem path where Synapse should write its log output.

replication.description: Replication configuration controlling whether and how Synapse syncs event data to external storage.

mode.description: Replication execution mode: disabled turns replication off, auto runs replication automatically, and manual requires explicit replication commands.

replicator.description: Replicator definition used when replication is configured. May be null when replication is disabled.

name.description: Stable replicator name used to identify this replication target in config and runtime output.

type.description: Replicator backend type. Currently only file-based replication is supported.

config.description: Configuration for the selected replicator backend.

path.description: Filesystem path where the file replicator stores replicated event data.
